summary: Independent PS-R11 re-audit: harness re-run confirms 257 tests green (27 files) and typecheck clean; the 62 env:node ACs are all genuinely PASS with no masked FAIL. The two prior-round P3 findings are remediated: AC-061 now has a real runtime cross-origin iframe outline+label implementation (src/runtime/utils/iframe-overlay.ts) plus 8 green unit tests, and AC-083 now has a real visual-regression suite (tests/integration/visual-regression.spec.ts) with toHaveScreenshot across the SPEC §14 matrix. All 7 UNAVAILABLE ACs are correctly env-blocked with implementation/test artifacts present; no closure regressed. Verdict NO_FINDINGS.
